arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Challenge Man City for PSG Summer Transfer Target
arts.sum: This summer, Paris Saint-Germain was among the clubs interested in Sporting Lisbon midfielder Morten Hjulmand. However, the Portuguese side was unwilling to let him go unless his €80 million release clause was met. The 24-year-old played a key role last season, making 49 appearances across all competitions, scoring four goals, and providing four assists.
